name: claude-deep-suite
description: Deep Suite — structured workflow, wiki, autonomous experimentation, independent code review, and document gardening plugins

plugins.name: deep-work
plugins.description: Evidence-Driven Development Protocol — auto-flow orchestration with TDD enforcement, slice-based execution, and receipt validation

plugins.name: deep-wiki
plugins.description: LLM-managed markdown wiki for persistent knowledge accumulation — based on Karpathy's LLM Wiki philosophy

plugins.name: deep-evolve
plugins.description: Autonomous Experimentation Protocol — goal-driven experiment loops that systematically improve any project

plugins.name: deep-review
plugins.description: Independent Evaluator for AI coding agents — cross-model code review with Codex integration

plugins.name: deep-docs
plugins.description: Document gardening agent — validates freshness and auto-repairs CLAUDE.md, AGENTS.md, and project docs
